HGSS.687.0001:
You are sure strong. But I don’t
want to just slink away...\f
I know! Could I get your number?
Let’s meet up for more battles![0200,0000]
HGSS.687.0002:
Don’t forget to come and see me
when I challenge you!
HGSS.687.0003:
A Bird Keeper friend isn’t a bad thing to
have, I’d say...\f
Won’t you reconsider?
HGSS.687.0004:
I want to battle tough Trainers as
often as I can!\f
Could I get your number?
Let’s meet up for more battles![0200,0000]
HGSS.687.0005:
You are really, really strong!\f
Thanks for taking me on so often--
I learned a whole lot from you.\f
I know! This will do as my thanks!\f
HGSS.687.0006:
You’re nearby, aren’t you?\f
Why not come and talk in person?
HGSS.687.0007:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s become tougher.
We’ve achieved liftoff!\f
We can easily beat [0100,000B,0000]!\f
...Huh? You, too? Isn’t that great?
Let’s talk later!
HGSS.687.0008:
My [0100,000A,0000]’s become tougher.
We’ve achieved liftoff!\f
But get this, a wild [0100,000B,0000] just
barely eluded us.\r
I wanted to Fly after it...\f
Let’s talk later!
HGSS.687.0009:
Right now, I’m on [0104,0003,0000].
You know--where I first met you?\f
Want to battle? I’ll wait here.
HGSS.687.0012:
I’ll be looking forward to our
next battle!
